<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/promotion-tasks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List PromotionTask resources from a project's namespace. Returns
a PromotionTaskList resource.

  as={"h2"}
